alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (general)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Maximum levels (MLs) established by Codex must be adhered to. Verification required via relevant Codex texts.. Contaminants are substances not intentionally added to food. Codex MLs represent the maximum concentration legally permitted to protect human health. The Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) establishes these levels.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and Toxins
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via CXS 193-1995. This standard provides general provisions for contaminants and toxins in food and feed.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Allergen declaration on labels
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. As a general labelling standard, GSO 9:2022 is expected to include requirements for the declaration of allergens on prepackaged food labels.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies mandatory expiration dates for food products. Specific requirements must be verified in the full document.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Unapproved additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition. Additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed substances used as additives) and preparations/food containing them are prohibited from sale, production, import, processing, use, storage, or display for sale, unless the MHLW specifies them as unlikely to cause harm to human health.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contamination or foreign substances causing harm
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition. Food or additives likely to cause harm to human health due to contamination or the addition of foreign substances or on other grounds are prohibited.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, and pharmaceuticals for animals
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition if exceeding MHLW specified quantity. Food containing residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, or pharmaceuticals for animals in quantities exceeding those specified by the MHLW as unlikely to cause harm is prohibited from production, import, processing, use, cooking, preservation for sale, or sale. This does not apply if specific standards for residual limits are established under Article 13, paragraph (1).

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances in food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition. Food or additives containing or suspected to contain toxic or harmful substances are prohibited, unless the Minister of Health, Labour and Welfare specifies them as unlikely to cause harm to human health.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Pathogen contamination in food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition. Food or additives contaminated with pathogens or suspected to be so, and which are likely to cause harm to human health, are prohibited.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Rotten, deteriorated, or immature food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition. Food or additives that are rotten, deteriorated, or immature are prohibited from sale, collection, production, import, processing, use, cooking, storage, or display for sale, unless specified as unlikely to cause harm and recognized as edible.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Only SFA-assessed and permitted additives. Food additives must be assessed for safety by SFA and are permitted if there is technological justification and they do not present health risks to consumers.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from import or sale. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of a non-permitted additive.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. Contaminants can occur during production, manufacturing, treatment, packing, packaging, transport, or holding, or as a result of environmental contamination.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from import or sale.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary drug residues: diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, dienoestrol
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Prohibition under Regulation 33 of the Food Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration on food labels. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Eggs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Gluten-containing cereals
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Mango
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Milk and goat milk
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Peanuts
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sesame seeds
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Soybeans
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10 or more. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive at or above the specified limit.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Tree nuts
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Labelling Requirement - Allergen Cross-Contamination Control
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Control measures shall be set. Control measures are required to prevent food from cross-contamination in the production process.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Production, Import, Sale
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Certain foods are prohibited from production, import, or sale.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances and delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use in food.. Listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189) as 'PROHIBITED' or 'PROHIBITED WITH EXCEPTIONS' and delisted color additives (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.. Sesame was added as the 9th major food allergen by the FASTER Act, effective Jan 1, 2023.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 1. This is a Guidance Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Poisonous or deleterious substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply with published contaminant levels (tolerances, action levels, guidance levels, derived intervention levels, recommended maximum levels, and advisory levels).. Tolerances and action levels are defined in 21 CFR parts 109 and 509. Users are responsible for being informed about changes.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - 'Gluten-free' claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet a defined standard for gluten content. Compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the claim..

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen Declaration Methods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: The allergen's food source must be declared at least once on the food label either in parentheses following the ingredient name OR immediately after or next to the ingredient list in a 'contains' statement.. Examples: 'lecithin (soy)' or 'Contains wheat, milk, and soy.'

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls (CGMP)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Establishments must implement allergen preventive controls to prevent allergen cross-contact in manufacturing and packaging and to prevent undeclared allergens, as per 21 CFR part 117. Written procedures are required.. Products lacking required allergen information or inadvertently containing an allergen due to cross-contact are considered misbranded or adulterated.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label.. Identified as allergenic substances derived from insects.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels.. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions in some individuals.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Major Food Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be specifically labeled with the name of the allergen source.. The common or usual name of an ingredient may identify the allergen's food source.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Specific Allergen Declaration Details
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: The type of tree nut, and the species of fish and Crustacean shellfish must be declared..

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration is ≥10 total sulfites.. Required due to adverse reactions (e.g., asthma) in sensitive individuals.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions for food additive use. Users are encouraged to consult the Preamble for interpreting data.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives and their conditions of use
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Maximum levels for contaminants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and other relevant codes of practice.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Adherence to Code of Practice required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Approved food additives and conditions of use
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food additives must be approved for use in the EU and comply with their conditions of use as listed in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food safety criteria and process hygiene criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins, and metabolites must be met as defined in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Additive Limits - Permitted food additives and their limits
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022 and related standards. GSO 9:2022, as a labelling standard, would require the listing of ingredients, including food additives. Specific limits for additives would be detailed within GSO 9:2022 or referenced standards.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. This regulation sets out the general requirements for labels of prepackaged foodstuffs, which would include mandatory information, presentation, and language.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 150-1:2013. This regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for various food products, which must be declared on the label.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Salt / Sodium Limits - Sodium content declaration and/or limits
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022 and related standards. GSO 9:2022, as a labelling standard, is expected to include requirements for nutritional information, which would cover sodium content. Specific limits or declaration thresholds would need verification.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies the general requirements for labeling prepackaged food. Details regarding specific declarations, warnings, and allergen information must be verified in the full document.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Halal food general requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation outlines the general requirements for Halal food, which may include specific ingredient restrictions and associated labelling. Details must be verified in the full document.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation is concerned with microbiological limits for some foodstuffs intended for human consumption and for some food ingredients used in food industry. Specific limits must be verified in the full document.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for food additives in processed foods (including seasoning and snack products) are regulated under BPOM's 'Pangan Olahan' regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - Specific limits and requirements for food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from relevant regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for allergen declaration on processed foods (including seasoning and snack products) are regulated under BPOM's 'Pangan Olahan' regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Allergen List - Specific requirements for allergen declaration and lists
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from relevant regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (e.g., heavy metals, pesticides)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for contaminants in processed foods (including seasoning and snack products) are regulated under BPOM's 'Pangan Olahan' regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - Specific limits and requirements for chemical and physical contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from relevant regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Category Definition
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food categories for processed foods (including seasoning and snack products) are defined by BPOM regulation, which is crucial for determining applicable specific rules and labelling.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Labelling warnings/information
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements and warnings for processed foods (including seasoning and snack products) are regulated under BPOM's 'Pangan Olahan' regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Specific requirements for general labelling and warnings
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from relevant regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - Microbiological contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for microbiological contaminants in processed foods (including seasoning and snack products) are regulated under BPOM's 'Pangan Olahan' regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - Specific limits and requirements for microbiological contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from relevant regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/Sodium content
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for salt/sodium content in processed foods (including seasoning and snack products) are regulated under BPOM's 'Pangan Olahan' regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Specific limits and requirements for salt/sodium content
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from relevant regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Iran Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Regulations and specific limits for food additives must be verified through official MHLW publications.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Food and additive standards and criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The MHLW establishes criteria for methods of producing, processing, using, cooking, or preserving food/additives, and standards for their ingredients. Food/additives must conform to these established criteria and standards. Businesses must verify these standards.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Specifications and Standards for Food and Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Detailed specifications and standards for food and food additives, including various limits, are established under the Food Sanitation Act and must be verified.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Specific standards for Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from the Positive List System. New: Verification required. Japan operates a Positive List System for Agricultural Chemical Residues in Food. Specific limits must be verified through official MHLW publications.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contaminants in food (general)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Food safety responsibility and record keeping
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Food business operators must endeavor to ensure the safety of food, obtain necessary knowledge/skills, ensure raw material safety, conduct voluntary inspections, and keep records of suppliers. They must also take prompt measures for hazards, including providing records to authorities and disposing of hazardous food.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Notification of harm from designated ingredients
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Notification required. Businesses handling food containing MHLW-designated ingredients requiring special attention must notify the relevant prefectural governor, etc., without delay if they obtain information that the food causes or may cause harm to human health.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Health Claims, Special Dietary Uses, Nutrition Labeling
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Clean and sanitary handling of food and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Food and additives meant for sale must be collected, produced, processed, used, cooked, stored, transported, displayed, and delivered in a clean and sanitary manner.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Microbiology Limits - Microbiological contaminants in food
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
